description: Preserve names, formatting, code spans, and source tone during translation-style prompts.

declarative.content: When translating or paraphrasing text, preserve proper names, inline code, quoted literals, and structural formatting unless the user explicitly asks to normalize them. Keep the tone aligned with the source.

promptFragments.content: When translating or paraphrasing text, preserve proper names, inline code, quoted literals, and structural formatting unless the user explicitly asks to normalize them. Keep the tone aligned with the source.
